repo_path: <absolute path to your research repo, e.g. /Users/you/my-model>
config_flag: use_<feature> — off by default; zero/identity init so step 0 is byte-identical to the baseline
tier: <your ONE fixed small scale, e.g. '1M params / 3M tokens, one seed'>
metric: <the number you score on, e.g. 'val_loss (lower is better)'>
scorer: <the pass/fail bar, e.g. 'treatment beats baseline by more than the noise band'>
init_constraint: <step-0 equivalence rule, e.g. 'zero/identity init — step 0 output byte-identical to baseline'>
compute: read autoresearch/remote-box.json (written from VoidSpark → Settings → GPU box)
